REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JANE MARTIN MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT AND ANSWER OF SMART BUILDERS, INC.IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE REQUEST TO STRIKE ANSWER. NOTICE OF MOTION IS INSUFFICIENT TO PROVIDE NOTICE OF THIS RELIEF. SEE NOTICE OF MOTION 1:19-20. MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AS STAYED FOR 30 DAYS FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN COUNSEL. IF NO SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY IS FILED WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER, DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR EX-PARTE TO LIFT THE STAY. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: NEWTON J. LAM, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gregory Shaughnessy, Esq. (415-435-2409) for Defendant/Moving party JANE MARTIN.
Roger Wintle, Esq. (408-925-0146) specially appearing for Cross Defendant/Opposing party Eduardo Gutierrez who is not a named party at this time.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Moving party is not contesting. ARGUED. Counsel on Court Call intends to file an opposition. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JANE MARTIN Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. First Amended Cross-Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint

Motion To Strike Complaint And Answer Of Smart Builders, Inc.
Off Calendar Dec-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JANE MARTIN Motion To Strike Complaint And Answer Of Smart Builders, Inc.is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to the request to strike answer. Notice of Motion is insufficient to provide notice of this relief. See Notice of Motion 1:19-20. Motion to Strike Complaint is GRANTED as stayed for 30 days for Plaintiff to obtain counsel. If no substitution of attorney is filed within 30 days of notice of entry of order, Defendant may appear ex-parte to lift the stay. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Newton J. Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS COMPLAINANT JANE MARTIN Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended X-Complaint is DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1324 (a)(1) (Ex. D to Shaughnessy Declaration); (a)(2)-(3) (Motion and Memorandum of Points and Authorities); (b)(1) (Shaughnessy Declaration). Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Newton J. Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
